items.title: Test full webhook flow end-to-end with real signal
items.notes: Send real test signal through webhook -> validate -> risk -> execute. ✅ Full flow tested: webhook received at 127.0.0.1:8000, validation passed, risk check passed (size multiplier 0.6 due to high-severity macro), order submitted to Alpaca paper (order_id: cbd3b41a-15ca-4567-ac08-c2ae9cb92f96)

items.title: Test new RSS feeds - verify they're working
items.notes: Run rss_monitor and confirm Yahoo, CNBC, Reuters feeds return data. ✅ Results: 20 feeds scanned, 10 success (50% hit rate). Working feeds: Yahoo_Finance ✓, CNBC_Top ✓, Reuters_BreakingViews ✓. Failed: Reuters_Finance (URL control chars), Business_Bloomberg, FinancialJuice, YCombinator, ZeroHedge, UnusualWhales. 98 matching entries found.

items.title: Add README section for quick start guide
items.notes: Add quick start section to README. ✅ Quick Start added covering: prerequisites, setup, test signal, check execution.

items.title: Document pattern matching logic for future reference
items.notes: Document how signals are matched to patterns. ✅ Created docs/pattern-matching.md with 24 patterns, two-stage matching (keyword + weighted scoring), and examples.

items.title: Add Telegram alerts for executed trades
items.notes: Add Telegram notification when orders execute. ✅ Created src/trade_notifier.py, integrated into execution_orchestrator.py

items.title: Build a simple accuracy dashboard
items.notes: Create dashboard to visualize signal accuracy data. ✅ Created dashboard.py — 11 signals tracked, 88.9% accuracy, supports --html output

items.title: Add test harness + fixtures for validator and risk guards
items.notes: Add unit tests for validator and risk guards per P2.4. ✅ Created tests/fixtures.py, test_signal_validator.py (26 tests), test_risk_manager.py (24 tests). All 47 pass.

items.title: Add Reddit sentiment data source
items.notes: Integrate Reddit as a sentiment data source. ✅ Already implemented - src/reddit_monitor.py tracks 12 subreddits, integrated into signal_generator.py
